serena_lsp_status: OPERATIONAL since 2026-05-07. Key: find_symbol --name_path_pattern (NOT --name_path); receiver methods need '(*Type).method' qualified form; find_referencing_symbols requires --relative_path as file (not dir); search_for_pattern uses --substring_pattern. Use JSON stdin pipe with '.' sentinel. WARNING: broad find_symbol queries (e.g. function name without kind filter) can take 70+ seconds - prefer Grep for plain lookups.

bash_policy_limits: Workspace shell blocks running multi-statement scripts (.sh files) and awk on /dev/null. mkdir/ls/wc/stat blocked outside /home/runner/work/gh-aw/gh-aw. Must Grep/Read directly and Write to memory directly (no mkdir). gh CLI in sandbox returns HTTP 403 on /meta endpoint - duplicate-issue detection by gh search not possible; rely on cache + safeoutputs.
